raw_consumer_statement: I purchased a built in microwave under order # XXXX on XXXX I used {$150.00} in gift cards and put the remaining balance of {$290.00} on my Home Depot card. The installers came out on XXXX but stated they could not install where my current microwave was because I need a built in and purchased an over the range. They left with the microwave and said they were cancelling my order. They never gave me any paperwork. They just left. I have been in contact with XXXX XXXX over the course of XXXX XXXX weeks trying to get a refund on my XXXX XXXX card as well as my gift cards being restored of {$150.00} so I can purchase the right one, but they are giving me the run around. Like they have no clue what is going on. I think they just stoled my {$150.00} gift card and are still trying to charge me for the microwave. I have a payment due on XXXX but I have no microwave. I paid with gift card ending XXXX and gift card ending XXXX with the balance on my XXXX XXXX card ending XXXX
